creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks. 

Changes from your original version: 
- Do not change PREFIX since it's harmful 
- Do not define PORTEPOCH since this is a new port 
- Change NO_CDROM to RESTRICTED since I couldn't find its license terms 
(If you are sure we can mirror the file in our FTP sites, please 
point me at the source/license)
